name: 利用敵人完成逆襲（遺囑反轉）
name_en: Turning enemies' betrayal into victory (will clause reversal)
description: 女主故意讓八位未婚夫當眾背叛自己，觸發祖父遺囑中的保護條款，直接繼承全部家產。敵人的攻擊反而成為女主的武器，這種以退為進的策略讓觀眾驚嘆於女主的智慧。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: If any fiance betrays you, then without marriage, you inherit immediately. ... You showed my video publicly just to make Brother and Chen betray you to your face. That way, you could inherit the Fu family fortune. Exactly.
